frontmatter.title: Historical Manuscripts Recongition using AttentionOCR — AI Journey 2020
frontmatter.description: In this article we want to share our team’s 2nd place solution for Artificial Intelligence Journey Junior 2020 Competition (Digital Peter track). This contest was about line-by-line recognition of Peter the Great’s manuscripts. The task is related to several AI technologies (Computer Vision, NLP, and knowledge graphs).
